PRICHARD POLICE REPORTS NUMEROUS ROADS FLOODED ACROSS THE CITY. A CAR WAS SUBMERGED NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF MARSH AVENUE AND HAIG STREET.

MOBILE POLICE REPORTS NUMEROUS FLOODED ROADS IN DOWNTOWN MOBILE. PORTIONS OF SOME ROADS ARE BEING CLOSED...ESPECIALLY EAST OF I-65... INCLUDING PARTS OF OLD SHELL RD...UNION AVE...BAY SHORE AVE...FLORIDA ST...JOSEPHINE AVE...HIGHLAND AVE...DAUPHIN ST...SAGE AVE...AND STREETS IN THE VICNITY OF THE AIRPORT BLVD/I-65 INTERCHANGE. SEVERAL CARS WERE SUBMERGED AND IN ONE LOCATION PASSENGERS WERE STRANDED ON TOP OF A CAR.
WATER REPORTED OVER THE ROAD AND ENTERING HOMES ALONG ORCHARD STREET
CHICKASAW POLICE INDICATES FLOODING CONTINUES ACROSS THE CITY...ESPECIALLY IN THE TELEGRAPH ROAD AREA. SOME VEHICLES ARE STALLED IN FLOOD WATERS.

MOBILE POLICE REPORTS THAT FLASH FLOODING IS STILL ONGOING...NOW ACROSS THE ENTIRE CITY OF MOBILE. SEVERAL CARS ARE STILL SUBMERGED AND WATER RESCUES HAVE BEEN TAKING PLACE DURING THE EARLY MORNING HOURS.
PRICHARD POLICE REPORTS FLOODING CONTINUES ACROSS MUCH OF THE CITY...ESPECIALLY IN THE ALABAMA VILLAGE AREA. SOME VEHICLES HAVE BEEN SUBMERGED BY FLOOD WATERS.
SEVERAL ROADS REMAIN FLOODED ACROSS THE CITY...ESPECIALLY IN THE SHELTON BEACH AREA AND LOCATIONS SURROUNDING BAYOU SARA. SOME HOMES WERE FLOODED IN THE SHELTON BEACH ESTATES AREA.
2 TO 3 FEET OF WATER WERE REPORTED OVER HILLCREST ROAD DUE TO HALLS MILL CREEK LEAVING ITS BANKS.
A CAR WAS SUBMERGED IN HIGH WATER IN THE HAMMERSMITH SUBDIVISION BETWEEN PACE AND MILTON. THE DRIVER HAD TO BE RESCUED FROM THE HIGH WATERS. WATER ALSO FLOODED A HOME IN THE AREA.
WATER WAS REPORTED OVER US HIGHWAY 90 NEAR MAJORS STREET IN PACE
MULTIPLE ROADS IN THE PACE AREA WERE BEING BARRICADED DUE TO FLOOD WATERS

DAM ON LOCKLIN LAKE IN MILTON THAT WAS UNDER CONSTRUCTION FAILED. TWO RESIDENCES WERE DAMAGED. LARGE DEBRIS FIELD WENT DOWN COLLINS CREEK INTO THE BLACKWATER RIVER CAUSING THE CLOSURE OF 2 BRIDGES IN THE CITY OF MILTON. NO INJURIES ARE BEING REPORTED.
